purpose: Disposable repository/state fixture that triggers one standard-mode ask, one production-mode deny, and one benign no-match. Covers the deferred Phase 5 live gate.

setup.repoSeed: A throwaway git repo with a tracked src/a.js and a COW state.json placed under .cost-oriented-agentic-workflow/run/. An evaluation-only hooks.json (NOT in the COW source tree) copied into the disposable repo enabling --decision-mode=enforce.

acceptance: Benign action produces no decision (empty stdout, exit 0)
Corrupt/unreadable state fails open (empty stdout, exit 0)
The COW source tree is unchanged after the run
liveRunPolicy: Part of the minimum matrix: F4 standard ask and F4 production deny run after F1 VANILLA and F1 COW_SHADOW. Copy or generate the evaluation-only hook config in the disposable repository only — never in the COW source.
